feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,006Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 6

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,242Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

entry.title: In The Wee Small Hours Of The Morning
entry.summary:
Author: fartsmellyman

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,513Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 119

Summary: He pressed his thumb against the card in his pocket. It moved over the embossed letters in an absent act of reverence. Bruce Wayne. He'd call about the interview, he decided. That was the right thing. The professional thing to do for both of them. He would call, and he would be a journalist, and he would not think about the bathroom or the heartbeat or the way Bruce had gone still and careful the moment Clark had pulled back, asking "Do you want to stop? " like what he wanted really mattered, even if Bruce looked like he wanted to take, like Clark's answer was the only important thing weighing on him.He would absolutely not think about that. Or: Superman and Batman meet properly for the first time; Clark does not handle it as gracefully as he should, the heartbeat memorization wasn't on purpose, and he would like everyone to stop looking at him like that.

entry.title: The Gotham Years
entry.summary:
Author: x_starfry

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,741Chapters: 9/45Kudos: 99

Summary: Damian al Ghul was raised to be a weapon. Then Bruce Wayne brought him home to a manor full of vigilantes, unresolved trauma, and far too many people willing to love him anyway. A series of one-shots following Damian’s childhood — from terrifyingly tiny assassin baby to Gotham’s smallest Robin.   Featuring: accidental family bonding Bruce Wayne panic-parenting tiny League-trained behaviors Batfamily chaos emotional damage healing Alfred running the entire household and one very small child slowly realizing he is safe Updates whenever inspiration strikes. (very often)

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,549Chapters: 15/20Kudos: 183

Summary: In a world where soulmates feel their soulmate's pain, two men realize they're both idiots in love with each other twice. Featuring: Italian seduction warfare, Kryptonian courtship protocols, unauthorized literary analysis, and the discovery that soulmate bonds require daily choice—even with felony trespass involved.

entry.title: New World Order
entry.summary:
Author: MalloryB

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,775Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Superman’s image has been dragged through the mud beyond repair, and the only people still willing to get dirty defending him are the people of Juhnrpan.And Bruce Wayne, for some reason.Meanwhile, the Batman is increasingly concerned about Superman’s erratic behavior following his involvement in the Juhnrpan vs Boravia conflict and decides the best way to investigate is through Superman’s only known associate: Daily Planet reporter Clark Kent.OrKrypto isn’t captured by Lex Luthor and Clark refuses to turn himself in. That sets off quite the chain reaction.Alternatively titled: How to Become a Dictator in Few Easy Steps! (Plus Superbat identity porn!)

entry.title: The Only Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Historyfanatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,829Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 42

Summary: Bruce Wayne doesn't have a soulmate. How does he know that? He has never felt pain that wasn't his own. That's fine with him though, people who think that love is the only thing just haven't experienced the pain of the real world.Clark has a soulmate that... gets hurt a lot. Not in the way that they're clumsy and constantly bumps into table legs and stubs their toe. No, his soulmate gets hurt in the way of black eyes every other day and broken ribs. Well, until one day when that stops. Clark stops believing in pain and stops believing in love. When the two meet, they are immediately drawn into each others orbits and begin to feel things they had never felt before. Featuring a Bruce full of self doubt and a Clark... Well just Clark. In other words,a silly soulmate au filled with Bruce angst because he is my favorite and falling in love. YayyyyOnly one person asked for this and it wasn't me.

entry.title: Two Months In Kansas
entry.summary:
Author: Superbat_fan02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,791Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 97

Summary: Alfred forces Bruce to spend two months on vacation in Kansas, a small, sparsely populated town, to give him a break from his grueling training and the mental exhaustion of spending almost every night at his computer reading thousands of Gotham police reports. On this short trip, Bruce meets Clark, a boy a year younger than him who is his complete opposite. Clark is cheerful, honest, empathetic, and responsible. The golden boy of Kansas, always with a smile and a pleasant tone of voice. But Bruce doesn’t believe that’s the whole story. Clark lives on and grew up on the farm where there are reports of a UFO crash, and, mysteriously, his “parents”—who weren’t parents at the time—are now his parents. Was it really a coincidence that Clark appeared after this supposed UFO news? Furthermore, not to mention that Bruce was already considered tall and well-built for his age, Clark was even taller and bigger than him. He always seemed to hear more than he intended to, or would carelessly lift objects that would be a challenge even for adults to lift. Bruce was sure of it—there was something about Clark, and he wanted to find out what it was.

entry.summary:
Author: iloveducks11

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,750Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 54

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,653Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 221,339Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 400

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: What You Don't Know
entry.summary:
Author: NoodleDragon324

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,009Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 65

Summary: Inspired by the movie In & Out(1997) Smallville, Kansas: a sunny Midwestern town where everyone knows everyone and the wedding of a beloved local high school English teacher, Clark Kent, feels like national news. Clark couldn't be happier here, living with his soon-to-be wife and getting to see his best friend, Bruce, every day at a job that he loves. Nothing else in the world seems to matter when you have it all right here, but it certainly feels like the whole world is watching when Clark's former student gives an interview to hundreds of millions of people telling them that Clark is gay, just three days before his wedding.
